zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel Talbot於1444年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊克本時，她的父親Sir John Talbot19歲，母親Johanna Radcliffe1歲。她於1463年之前與Sir John Ashton在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1531年3月27日在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓享年87歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel Talbot于1444年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊克本时，她的父亲Sir John Talbot19岁，母亲Johanna Radcliffe1岁。她于1463年之前与Sir John Ashton在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1531年3月27日在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓享年87岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel Talbot was born in 1444, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John Talbot, was 19 and her mother, Johanna Radcliffe, was 1. She married Sir John Ashton before 1463, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 27 March 1531, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Middleton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel Talbot est née en 1444, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Talbot, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Johanna Radcliffe, avait 1 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Ashton avant 1463, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1531, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel Talbot 1444 in Blackburn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Talbot 19 und ihre Mutter Johanna Radcliffe 1. Sie hat vor 1463 in England Sir John Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 27. März 1531 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Middleton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Middleton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Talbot è nata il nel 1444 nel Blackburn, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir John Talbot, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Johanna Radcliffe, aveva 1 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Ashton prima del 1463, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 27 marzo 1531, nel Middleton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Middleton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Talbotが1444年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで生まれた時，父Sir John Talbotは19歳，母Johanna Radcliffeは1歳であった。1463年以前にイギリスでSir John Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1531年3月27日にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで87歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel Talbot(이)가 1444년 영국 랭카실르 블랙번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Talbot(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Radcliffe(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 1463년 이전 영국에서 Sir John Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1531년 3월 27일 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel Talbot nasceu em 1444, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Talbot, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Radcliffe, tinha 1 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Ashton antes 1463, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1531, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel Talbot родилась в 1444 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Talbot было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Radcliffe, 1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Ashton перед 1463 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 27 марта 1531 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabel Talbot nació en 1444, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Talbot, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Johanna Radcliffe, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Sir John Ashton antes de 1463, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1531, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
